issues.description: Effect uses OnPlay trigger but the official text says '[Your Turn]' which is a continuous effect, not a one-time OnPlay effect. Should use Activated trigger instead.
Duration is 'EndOfTurn' but the official text says '[Your Turn]' which requires 'DuringYourTurn' duration to apply continuously during your turns only.
Missing condition to filter for {Alabasta} type characters. The effect should only boost Characters with the Alabasta type.
Missing exclusion of 'this Character' (self). The effect states 'other than this Character' so Nefeltari Cobra should not boost itself.
